# ThunderGits

> ThunderGits Consultancy Services Pvt Ltd is an AI-driven IT solutions company founded in Bihar, India. We build web applications, mobile apps, custom software, and digital marketing solutions for startups, SMEs, and enterprises globally. Trusted by 50+ brands with a team of 25+ specialists.

## Services

- [Web Development](https://thundergits.com/service.html#website-development): Custom responsive websites, CMS integration, web applications, React, Next.js
- [Mobile App Development](https://thundergits.com/service.html#application-development): iOS and Android apps using React Native and Flutter
- [Digital Marketing](https://thundergits.com/service.html#digital-marketing): SEO, PPC, social media marketing, content strategy, analytics
- [UI/UX Design](https://thundergits.com/service.html): User research, wireframing, prototyping, interface design
- [Cybersecurity](https://thundergits.com/service.html): Vulnerability assessments, threat monitoring, encryption, security integrations
- [Machine Learning & AI](https://thundergits.com/service.html#machine-learning-ai): Predictive analytics, NLP, computer vision, AI automation
- [Cloud Computing](https://thundergits.com/service.html#cloud-computing): AWS/Azure/GCP migrations, cloud-native development, infrastructure management
- [IT Consultancy](https://thundergits.com/service.html#it-consultancy): Technology roadmaps, governance, compliance, system integrations
- [E-Commerce Solutions](https://thundergits.com/service.html#ecommerce-solutions): Online stores, payment gateways, inventory management, Shopify/WooCommerce
- [Custom Software Development](https://thundergits.com/service.html#custom-software): CRMs, ERPs, SaaS platforms, bespoke enterprise systems
- [Business Intelligence](https://thundergits.com/service.html#business-intelligence): Dashboards, KPI tracking, big-data analytics, Power BI
- [DevOps & CloudOps](https://thundergits.com/service.html#devops-cloudops): CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, cost optimization, Kubernetes
- [AI Consulting](https://thundergits.com/service.html#ai-consulting): AI strategy, model development and deployment, automation roadmaps

## Company Information

ThunderGits Consultancy Services Pvt Ltd is registered in India. The company has completed 50+ projects for clients ranging from startups to established enterprises. The team comprises 25+ professionals including developers, designers, and strategists.

**Key facts:**
- 50+ projects completed
- 55+ happy clients
- 3+ years of experience
- 25+ team members
- Clients: Davabharti, Enersol, Thikana, WeThePeopleOfPatna, Ganesha Foundation, AAP Bihar, Pasuseva, Coding Pandas
